problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
